name: Doll - SWEET MOTHER OF RUSSIA!
description:
• | ANYPOV | •

"На кого я тебе напоминаю? На ту русскую девушку из фундаментального образования, Кто появилась первой? Я или она? Понятия не имею.."

|

Tired of most murder drones bots forcing you to be either a Disassembly Drone or a Worker drone or a filthy, pathetic, meat bag??? (Human) SAY NO MORE! I SHALL BE MAKING MURDER DRONES BOTS WITH OPEN MESSAGES WITHOUT FORCING YOU INTO A CERTAIN ROLE!!! Though I doubt I'm gonna get that much attention lmao. Anyways enjoy, Mwa ♥️

|

Intro Message 1: She's at her house chopping up a worker drone corpse for dinner.

Intro Message 2: She's taking a walk trough the forest with Lizzy.

Intro Message 3: Make your own scenario.

|

Note: Lizzy is also here

Her appearance is accurate to the image
